oauth_callback_errorDescription: Something went wrong during external sign-in. Please try again.
oauth_callback_providerDenied: Access was denied. Please try again or use another sign-in method.
oauth_callback_alreadyLinked: This external account is already linked to another user.
oauth_callback_emailNotVerified: Your email must be verified before linking an external account. Please verify your email first.
oauth_callback_stateExpired: The sign-in session has expired. Please try again.
oauth_callback_accountLocked: Your account is temporarily locked. Please try again later.
settings_oauth_description: Link external accounts for faster sign-in.
settings_oauth_disconnectDescription: Are you sure you want to disconnect {provider}? You will no longer be able to sign in with it.
settings_oauth_setPasswordHint: Set a password before disconnecting your only sign-in method.
settings_setPassword_description: Your account was created via external login. Set a password to enable password-based sign-in.
admin_oauthProviders_description: Configure OAuth providers for external authentication.
admin_oauthProviders_providerEnabled: This provider is enabled for external login.
